About Me

Let me tell you a few things...

BIO

I'm a Software Engineer with experience in building Small-Business to Enterprise-Level eCommerce websites.

  • Building professional-looking websites to enhance the company's online brand
  • Develop custom features to meet client's custom business requirements
  • Initiate online marketing strategies to reach the company's business goals

Adept at Drupal and WordPress development with in-depth technical skill in:

  • Responsive Theme development
  • Custom Module/Plugin development
  • Enhance UI/UX for better user experience
  • Web Service API development and integration

With positive attitude and deep desire to build websites that last.

True Apex

Software Engineer

Lead in developing eCommerce websites using Drupal Commerce.
Build Responsive websites from PSD Design to a Fully-Functional Drupal site.
Develop custom Themes and Modules.

Bridge Technology Partners

Software Engineer

Developed Web Service APIs.
Embraces Test-Driven Development methodology to assure code quality and faster deployment.

Elementz Interactive

Software Engineer

Develop an Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system for clients.
Develop a RESTful Web Service Application with output format in JSON.
Develop projects using CodeIgniter and Laravel Web Framework.
Develop a Single-Page Web Application using Backbone JS.
Convert PSD designs into a fully-functional web application.

Infocus Multimedia and Business Solutions

Web Developer

Lead in developing e-Commerce websites.
Customize Drupal modules to function as per business requirements.

A5 Project

Web Developer

Develop websites ranging from personal blogging to ecommerce websites.
Fix design issues and install added functionalities on client’s websites.
Customize scripts to meet client’s requirements.

Teradyne Philippines Ltd.

Board Repair Specialist

Quality repair electronic boards, solder/de-solder components.
Troubleshoot and quality test electronic boards using Teradyne's Automatic Test Equipment (ATE).
